desc: the constexpr in src/sim/TeamConfig.hpp that folds a per-axis velocity (with speed/morale/stamina/fitness modifiers) into an integer position step; the scalar and SIMD movement paths share it
the constexpr in src/sim/TeamConfig.hpp that maps a soldier's stamina value to a [floor, 1] speed multiplier
the Renderer method (src/render/Renderer.cpp) that draws many same-colour FILLED rects in one batched SDL_RenderFillRectsF call
the Renderer method (src/render/Renderer.cpp) that draws many same-colour OUTLINED rects in one batched SDL_RenderDrawRectsF call
the Renderer method (src/render/Renderer.cpp) that draws a batch of disjoint line segments with one colour set for the whole run
